entries.name: 语音通话插件启动
entries.replaceString:
<script>
(function(){
try{
  var T; try{T=window.top||window}catch(_){T=window}
  var D=T.document||document;
  var KEY='vc_booted';
  if(T[KEY])return;
  T[KEY]=true;

  var css=D.createElement('style');
  css.textContent=[
    '#vc-btn{position:fixed;bottom:440px;right:16px;z-index:9500;width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(34,197,94,0.92),rgba(16,185,129,0.85));border:1px solid rgba(150,255,200,0.5);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(34,197,94,0.45);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);transition:transform .15s;}',
    '#vc-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.08);}',
    '#vc-btn:active{transform:scale(0.95);}',
    '#vc-screen{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9900;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0b1622,#070d14 60%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;color:#fff;font-family:-apple-system,"PingFang SC",sans-serif;}',
    '#vc-mid{flex:1 1 auto;min-height:0;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}',
    '#vc-head{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:5;width:100%;background:#0b1622;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);}',
    '#vc-captionwrap{width:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}',
    '#vc-topbar{width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:18px 20px;box-sizing:border-box;}',
    '#vc-statustxt{font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);}',
    '#vc-mintab{font-size:18px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);cursor:pointer;padding:4px 8px;}',
    '.vc-avwrap{position:relative;width:52px;height:52px;flex-shrink:0;}',
    '@keyframes vc-pulse{0%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.7;}100%{transform:scale(1.5);opacity:0;}}',
    '.vc-ringpulse{position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid rgba(34,197,150,0.6);animation:vc-pulse 1.6s ease-out infinite;}',
    '.vc-ringpulse.r2{animation-delay:.5s;}',
    '.vc-ringpulse.r3{animation-delay:1s;}',
    '#vc-avatar{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;background:#1e293b;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);position:relative;z-index:2;}',
    '@keyframes vc-talk{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(34,197,150,0.45);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 9px rgba(34,197,150,0);}}',
    '#vc-avatar.talking{animation:vc-talk 1s ease-in-out infinite;}',
    '#vc-headrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 20px;}',
    '#vc-headtext{text-align:left;}',
    '#vc-name{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;}',
    '#vc-substatus{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin-top:2px;min-height:15px;}',
    '#vc-wave{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;height:16px;margin-top:4px;}',
    '.vc-bar{width:3px;border-radius:2px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#4ade80,#22c55e);height:4px;transition:height .12s;}',
    '#vc-caption{width:88%;max-width:380px;margin:16px 0 14px;min-height:70px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:16px;padding:14px 16px;font-size:14.5px;line-height:1.7;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.92);box-sizing:border-box;}',
    '.vc-line{margin-bottom:12px;}',
    '.vc-line:last-child{margin-bottom:0;}',
    '.vc-line .role{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);margin-bottom:3px;}',
    '.vc-line.me .role{color:rgba(134,239,172,0.7);}',
    '#vc-bottom{flex:0 0 auto;width:100%;padding:18px 24px calc(28px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom,0px));box-sizing:border-box;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(7,13,20,0),rgba(7,13,20,0.9) 30%);}',
    '#vc-ptt-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:18px;}',
    '#vc-ptt-input{flex:1;padding:13px 16px;border-radius:24px;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:#fff;font-size:14px;box-sizing:border-box;}',
    '#vc-ptt-input::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);}',
    '#vc-ptt-btn{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#22c55e,#16a34a);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:21px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(34,197,94,0.4);transition:transform .12s;border:none;color:#fff;}',
    '#vc-ptt-btn:active{transform:scale(0.92);}',
    '#vc-ptt-btn.sending{opacity:0.5;pointer-events:none;}',
    '#vc-controls{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:34px;}',
    '.vc-ctrlbtn{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border:none;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;}',
    '.vc-ctrlbtn.active{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);color:#0b1622;}',
    '#vc-hangup{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ef4444,#dc2626);border:none;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:26px;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(239,68,68,0.5);transform:rotate(135deg);}',
    '#vc-incoming-btns{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:60px;margin-top:50px;}',
    '.vc-bigbtn{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:26px;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;}',
    '#vc-accept{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#22c55e,#16a34a);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(34,197,94,0.5);}',
    '#vc-decline{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ef4444,#dc2626);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(239,68,68,0.5);transform:rotate(135deg);}',
    '#vc-mini{position:fixed;bottom:24px;left:16px;z-index:9850;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(15,23,30,0.92);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,150,0.4);border-radius:30px;padding:6px 14px 6px 6px;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);cursor:pointer;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);}',
    '#vc-mini img{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;}',
    '#vc-mini .t{font-size:12px;color:#86efac;}',
  ].join('');
  D.head.appendChild(css);

  function mk(t,a,p){var e=D.createElement(t);Object.keys(a||{}).forEach(function(k){e[k]=a[k]});if(p)p.appendChild(e);return e;}
  function rm(el){el&&el.parentNode&&el.parentNode.removeChild(el);}

  var CALL=null; // {charId,charName,charAvatar,startTs,timerInt,waveInt,minimized}

  async function getCurrentChar(){
    try{
      var chat=await tavo.chat.current();
      if(chat && chat.characters && chat.characters[0]){
        var brief=chat.characters[0];
        var full=null;
        try{ full=await tavo.character.get(brief.id); }catch(e){}
        return {
          id:brief.id,
          name:(full&&full.name)||brief.name,
          avatar:(full&&full.avatar)||brief.avatar,
        };
      }
    }catch(e){}
    return null;
  }

  function fmtTime(sec){
    var m=Math.floor(sec/60), s=sec%60;
    return (m<10?'0':'')+m+':'+(s<10?'0':'')+s;
  }

  function closeScreen(){ rm(D.getElementById('vc-screen')); }
  function closeMini(){ rm(D.getElementById('vc-mini')); }

  function buildWaveBars(container, n){
    container.innerHTML='';
    var bars=[];
    for(var i=0;i<n;i++){ var b=mk('div',{className:'vc-bar'},container); bars.push(b); }
    return bars;
  }
  function animateWave(bars, active){
    if(CALL.waveInt) clearInterval(CALL.waveInt);
    if(!active){ bars.forEach(function(b){b.style.height='4px';}); return; }
    CALL.waveInt=setInterval(function(){
      bars.forEach(function(b){ b.style.height=(4+Math.random()*18)+'px'; });
    }, 130);
  }

  function avatarSrc(av){
    if(!av) return '';
    if(/^(https?:|data:)/.test(av)) return av;
    try{ return tavo.file.url(av); }catch(e){ return av; }
  }

  function getAudioCtx(){
    try{
      if(!T.vc_actx){ T.vc_actx=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)(); }
      if(T.vc_actx.state==='suspended'){ T.vc_actx.resume(); }
      return T.vc_actx;
    }catch(e){ return null; }
  }
  function playTone(freqStart,freqEnd,duration,vol){
    var ctx=getAudioCtx(); if(!ctx) return;
    try{
      var osc=ctx.createOscillator(), gain=ctx.createGain();
      osc.type='sine';
      osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freqStart, ctx.currentTime);
      osc.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(Math.max(freqEnd,1), ctx.currentTime+duration);
      gain.gain.setValueAtTime(vol||0.12, ctx.currentTime);
      gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, ctx.currentTime+duration);
      osc.connect(gain); gain.connect(ctx.destination);
      osc.start(); osc.stop(ctx.currentTime+duration);
    }catch(e){}
  }
  function playSendSound(){ playTone(560,920,0.13,0.13); }
  function playReceiveSound(){
    playTone(480,720,0.14,0.12);
    setTimeout(function(){ playTone(720,980,0.12,0.1); }, 90);
  }
  function ringBeepOnce(){
    playTone(440,440,0.4,0.09);
    setTimeout(function(){ playTone(440,440,0.4,0.09); }, 500);
  }
  function startRingLoop(){
    ringBeepOnce();
    return setInterval(ringBeepOnce, 3000);
  }
  function stopRingLoop(intId){
    if(intId) clearInterval(intId);
  }

  async function startCallFlow(){
    closeMini();
    var screen=mk('div',{id:'vc-screen'},D.body);
    var top=mk('div',{id:'vc-topbar'},screen);
    var statusTxt=mk('div',{id:'vc-statustxt'},top); statusTxt.textContent='正在呼叫…';
    var minTab=mk('div',{id:'vc-mintab'},top); minTab.textContent='⌄';
    minTab.addEventListener('click',minimizeCall);

    var char=await getCurrentChar();
    if(!char){
      statusTxt.textContent='未找到当前聊天角色';
      setTimeout(closeScreen, 1500);
      return;
    }

    var mid=mk('div',{id:'vc-mid'},screen);
    var head=mk('div',{id:'vc-head'},mid);
    var headRow=mk('div',{id:'vc-headrow'},head);
    var avWrap=mk('div',{className:'vc-avwrap'},headRow);
    mk('div',{className:'vc-ringpulse'},avWrap);
    mk('div',{className:'vc-ringpulse r2'},avWrap);
    mk('div',{className:'vc-ringpulse r3'},avWrap);
    var avImg=mk('img',{id:'vc-avatar',src:avatarSrc(char.avatar)},avWrap);
    avImg.onerror=function(){ avImg.style.display='none'; };

    var headText=mk('div',{id:'vc-headtext'},headRow);
    var nameEl=mk('div',{id:'vc-name'},headText); nameEl.textContent=char.name;
    var subStatus=mk('div',{id:'vc-substatus'},headText); subStatus.textContent='正在等待对方接听…';
    var waveBox=mk('div',{id:'vc-wave'},headText);
    var bars=buildWaveBars(waveBox, 14);

    var captionWrap=mk('div',{id:'vc-captionwrap'},mid);
    var captionBox=mk('div',{id:'vc-caption'},captionWrap);
    captionBox.style.display='none';

    var bottom=mk('div',{id:'vc-bottom'},screen);
    var incomingBtns=mk('div',{id:'vc-incoming-btns'},bottom);
    var declineBtn=mk('button',{className:'vc-bigbtn',id:'vc-decline'},incomingBtns); declineBtn.textContent='📞';
    var acceptBtn=mk('button',{className:'vc-bigbtn',id:'vc-accept'},incomingBtns); acceptBtn.textContent='📞';

    declineBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){ stopRingLoop(CALL && CALL.ringInt); closeScreen(); });

    CALL={charId:char.id,charName:char.name,charAvatar:char.avatar,startTs:0,timerInt:null,waveInt:null,ringInt:null,minimized:false,bars:bars};
    CALL.ringInt=startRingLoop();

    acceptBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){
      stopRingLoop(CALL && CALL.ringInt);
      rm(incomingBtns);
      enterConnectedUI(screen, bottom, statusTxt, subStatus, captionBox, char);
    });

    // 自动"响铃"几秒后自动接通，模拟真实通话体验，也可手动提前点接听
    CALL._autoAccept=setTimeout(function(){
      if(D.getElementById('vc-incoming-btns')){ acceptBtn.click(); }
    }, 2600);
  }

  function enterConnectedUI(screen, bottom, statusTxt, subStatus, captionBox, char){
    playTone(380,620,0.18,0.1);
    statusTxt.textContent='通话中 00:00';
    subStatus.textContent='已接通';
    captionBox.style.display='block';
    captionBox.innerHTML='';
    appendCaptionLine(captionBox, char.name, '嗨～我在听呢，想聊点什么？', false);

    CALL.startTs=Date.now();
    CALL.timerInt=setInterval(function(){
      var sec=Math.floor((Date.now()-CALL.startTs)/1000);
      statusTxt.textContent='通话中 '+fmtTime(sec);
      var mini=D.getElementById('vc-mini-time');
      if(mini) mini.textContent=fmtTime(sec);
    }, 1000);

    bottom.innerHTML='';
    var pttRow=mk('div',{id:'vc-ptt-row'},bottom);
    var input=mk('input',{id:'vc-ptt-input',type:'text',placeholder:'按住说话…（这里用文字代替语音输入）'},pttRow);
    var pttBtn=mk('button',{id:'vc-ptt-btn'},pttRow); pttBtn.textContent='🎤';

    async function sendVoice(){
      var val=(input.value||'').trim();
      if(!val) return;
      input.value='';
      pttBtn.classList.add('sending');
      playSendSound();
      appendCaptionLine(captionBox, '你', val, true);
      try{ await tavo.message.append({role:'user', content:val}); }catch(e){}

      var avImg=D.getElementById('vc-avatar');
      if(avImg) avImg.classList.add('talking');
      animateWave(CALL.bars, true);
      subStatus.textContent=char.name+' 正在说话…';
      playReceiveSound();

      try{
        var reply=await tavo.generate(
          '系统提示（仅你可见，不要提及这是系统指令）：你正在和对方进行一次语音通话（口语化场景），对方刚刚说了一句话。请用你的角色身份和语气，用口语化、简短自然的方式回应，像真实打电话聊天一样，不要用书面语或大段描述，不超过3句话。',
          {context:true}
        );
        await tavo.message.append({role:'assistant', characterId:(typeof char.id==='number'?char.id:undefined), content:reply});
        await typewriterCaption(captionBox, char.name, reply);
      }catch(err){
        console.error('[语音通话]',err);
        appendCaptionLine(captionBox, char.name, '（信号好像不太好，没听清…）', false);
      }
      if(avImg) avImg.classList.remove('talking');
      animateWave(CALL.bars, false);
      subStatus.textContent='已接通';
      pttBtn.classList.remove('sending');
    }
    pttBtn.addEventListener('click',sendVoice);
    input.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){ if(e.key==='Enter') sendVoice(); });

    var ctrlRow=mk('div',{id:'vc-controls'},bottom);
    var muteBtn=mk('button',{className:'vc-ctrlbtn'},ctrlRow); muteBtn.textContent='🔇';
    muteBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){ muteBtn.classList.toggle('active'); });
    var speakerBtn=mk('button',{className:'vc-ctrlbtn active'},ctrlRow); speakerBtn.textContent='🔊';
    speakerBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){ speakerBtn.classList.toggle('active'); });
    var hangupBtn=mk('button',{id:'vc-hangup'},ctrlRow); hangupBtn.textContent='📞';
    hangupBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){ endCall(); });
  }

  function scrollCaptionToBottom(box){
    var mid=D.getElementById('vc-mid');
    if(mid) mid.scrollTop=mid.scrollHeight;
  }
  function appendCaptionLine(box, name, text, isMe){
    var line=mk('div',{className:'vc-line'+(isMe?' me':'')},box);
    mk('div',{className:'role'},line).textContent=name;
    var body=mk('div',{},line);
    body.textContent=text;
    scrollCaptionToBottom(box);
    return body;
  }
  async function typewriterCaption(box, name, text){
    var line=mk('div',{className:'vc-line'},box);
    mk('div',{className:'role'},line).textContent=name;
    var target=mk('div',{},line);
    var i=0;
    return new Promise(function(resolve){
      var timer=setInterval(function(){
        i+=2;
        target.textContent=text.slice(0,i);
        scrollCaptionToBottom(box);
        if(i>=text.length){ clearInterval(timer); resolve(); }
      }, 28);
    });
  }

  function endCall(){
    if(CALL && CALL.timerInt) clearInterval(CALL.timerInt);
    if(CALL && CALL.waveInt) clearInterval(CALL.waveInt);
    if(CALL && CALL.ringInt) clearInterval(CALL.ringInt);
    if(CALL && CALL._autoAccept) clearTimeout(CALL._autoAccept);
    var dur = CALL && CALL.startTs ? Math.floor((Date.now()-CALL.startTs)/1000) : 0;
    closeScreen();
    closeMini();
    if(CALL && CALL.startTs){
      try{ tavo.message.append({role:'user', content:'（通话已结束，本次通话时长 '+fmtTime(dur)+'）'}); }catch(e){}
    }
    CALL=null;
  }

  function minimizeCall(){
    if(!CALL || !CALL.startTs) { return; } // 还没接通时不允许最小化，避免丢失响铃状态
    closeScreen();
    var mini=mk('div',{id:'vc-mini'},D.body);
    var img=mk('img',{src:avatarSrc(CALL.charAvatar)},mini);
    var t=mk('div',{className:'t',id:'vc-mini-time'},mini);
    var sec=Math.floor((Date.now()-CALL.startTs)/1000);
    t.textContent=fmtTime(sec);
    mini.addEventListener('click',function(){
      rm(mini);
      reopenConnected();
    });
  }

  async function reopenConnected(){
    var screen=mk('div',{id:'vc-screen'},D.body);
    var top=mk('div',{id:'vc-topbar'},screen);
    var statusTxt=mk('div',{id:'vc-statustxt'},top);
    var minTab=mk('div',{id:'vc-mintab'},top); minTab.textContent='⌄';
    minTab.addEventListener('click',minimizeCall);

    var char={id:CALL.charId,name:CALL.charName,avatar:CALL.charAvatar};
    var mid=mk('div',{id:'vc-mid'},screen);
    var head=mk('div',{id:'vc-head'},mid);
    var headRow=mk('div',{id:'vc-headrow'},head);
    var avWrap=mk('div',{className:'vc-avwrap'},headRow);
    var avImg=mk('img',{id:'vc-avatar',src:avatarSrc(char.avatar)},avWrap);
    var headText=mk('div',{id:'vc-headtext'},headRow);
    var nameEl=mk('div',{id:'vc-name'},headText); nameEl.textContent=char.name;
    var subStatus=mk('div',{id:'vc-substatus'},headText); subStatus.textContent='已接通';
    var waveBox=mk('div',{id:'vc-wave'},headText);
    CALL.bars=buildWaveBars(waveBox, 14);
    var captionWrap=mk('div',{id:'vc-captionwrap'},mid);
    var captionBox=mk('div',{id:'vc-caption'},captionWrap);
    appendCaptionLine(captionBox, char.name, '（继续刚才的通话…）', false);
    var bottom=mk('div',{id:'vc-bottom'},screen);

    var sec=Math.floor((Date.now()-CALL.startTs)/1000);
    statusTxt.textContent='通话中 '+fmtTime(sec);
    CALL.timerInt=setInterval(function(){
      var s2=Math.floor((Date.now()-CALL.startTs)/1000);
      statusTxt.textContent='通话中 '+fmtTime(s2);
    }, 1000);

    bottom.innerHTML='';
    var pttRow=mk('div',{id:'vc-ptt-row'},bottom);
    var input=mk('input',{id:'vc-ptt-input',type:'text',placeholder:'按住说话…（这里用文字代替语音输入）'},pttRow);
    var pttBtn=mk('button',{id:'vc-ptt-btn'},pttRow); pttBtn.textContent='🎤';
    async function sendVoice(){
      var val=(input.value||'').trim();
      if(!val) return;
      input.value='';
      pttBtn.classList.add('sending');
      playSendSound();
      appendCaptionLine(captionBox, '你', val, true);
      try{ await tavo.message.append({role:'user', content:val}); }catch(e){}
      var avEl=D.getElementById('vc-avatar');
      if(avEl) avEl.classList.add('talking');
      animateWave(CALL.bars, true);
      subStatus.textContent=char.name+' 正在说话…';
      playReceiveSound();
      try{
        var reply=await tavo.generate(
          '系统提示（仅你可见，不要提及这是系统指令）：你正在和对方进行一次语音通话（口语化场景），对方刚刚说了一句话。请用你的角色身份和语气，用口语化、简短自然的方式回应，像真实打电话聊天一样，不要用书面语或大段描述，不超过3句话。',
          {context:true}
        );
        await tavo.message.append({role:'assistant', characterId:(typeof char.id==='number'?char.id:undefined), content:reply});
        await typewriterCaption(captionBox, char.name, reply);
      }catch(err){ console.error('[语音通话]',err); }
      if(avEl) avEl.classList.remove('talking');
      animateWave(CALL.bars, false);
      subStatus.textContent='已接通';
      pttBtn.classList.remove('sending');
    }
    pttBtn.addEventListener('click',sendVoice);
    input.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){ if(e.key==='Enter') sendVoice(); });

    var ctrlRow=mk('div',{id:'vc-controls'},bottom);
    var muteBtn=mk('button',{className:'vc-ctrlbtn'},ctrlRow); muteBtn.textContent='🔇';
    muteBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){ muteBtn.classList.toggle('active'); });
    var speakerBtn=mk('button',{className:'vc-ctrlbtn active'},ctrlRow); speakerBtn.textContent='🔊';
    speakerBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){ speakerBtn.classList.toggle('active'); });
    var hangupBtn=mk('button',{id:'vc-hangup'},ctrlRow); hangupBtn.textContent='📞';
    hangupBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){ endCall(); });
  }

  function tavoDock(){
    if(T.TAVO_DOCK) return T.TAVO_DOCK;
    var dcss=D.createElement('style');
    dcss.textContent=[
      '#tdk-fab{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:16px;z-index:9999;width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6366f1,#8b5cf6);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(99,102,241,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;transition:transform .15s;}',
      '#tdk-fab:active{transform:scale(0.92);}',
      '#tdk-panel{position:fixed;bottom:84px;right:16px;z-index:9998;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;align-items:flex-end;}',
      '.tdk-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;cursor:pointer;}',
      '.tdk-item .lb{background:rgba(15,15,25,0.92);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#e2e8f0;font-size:11.5px;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:8px;white-space:nowrap;}',
      '.tdk-item .ic{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(15,15,25,0.92);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);flex-shrink:0;}',
    ].join('');
    D.head.appendChild(dcss);
    var fab=D.createElement('div'); fab.id='tdk-fab'; fab.textContent='✨';
    D.body.appendChild(fab);
    var panelEl=null;
    function renderPanel(){
      if(panelEl){ panelEl.parentNode&&panelEl.parentNode.removeChild(panelEl); panelEl=null; return; }
      panelEl=D.createElement('div'); panelEl.id='tdk-panel';
      T.TAVO_DOCK.items.forEach(function(item){
        var row=D.createElement('div'); row.className='tdk-item';
        var lb=D.createElement('div'); lb.className='lb'; lb.textContent=item.title;
        var ic=D.createElement('div'); ic.className='ic'; ic.textContent=item.icon;
        row.appendChild(lb); row.appendChild(ic);
        row.addEventListener('click',function(e){
          e.stopPropagation();
          if(panelEl){ panelEl.parentNode&&panelEl.parentNode.removeChild(panelEl); panelEl=null; }
          item.onClick();
        });
        panelEl.appendChild(row);
      });
      D.body.appendChild(panelEl);
    }
    fab.addEventListener('click',function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); renderPanel(); });
    T.TAVO_DOCK={items:[], fab:fab, refresh:function(){ if(panelEl){ panelEl.parentNode&&panelEl.parentNode.removeChild(panelEl); panelEl=null; renderPanel(); } }};
    return T.TAVO_DOCK;
  }
  function registerDockItem(icon,title,onClick){
    var dock=tavoDock();
    dock.items.push({icon:icon,title:title,onClick:onClick});
    dock.refresh();
  }

  function buildButton(){
    registerDockItem('📞','语音通话',function(){
      if(D.getElementById('vc-screen')) return;
      startCallFlow();
    });
  }
  buildButton();
  console.log('[语音通话插件v1] 已加载（拟真UI，底层为文字交互）');

}catch(e){console.error('[语音通话插件]',e);}
})();
</script>
